---
bibliography: []
citeproc: false
csl: apa
format:
  typst:
    output-file: bnr_cvd_los_2023_v1.pdf
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    papersize: us-letter
    margin:
      top: 0.65in
      bottom: 0.70in
      left: 0.65in
      right: 0.65in
    mainfont: "Noto Sans"
    font-paths:
      - "../../../../assets/font/noto-sans"
    fontsize: 10pt
    linkcolor: "#e87a00"
    fig-cap-location: bottom
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        #let bnr_grey = rgb("#666666")
        #let bnr_light_grey = rgb("#B8B8B8")
        #let body_font = "Noto Sans"
        #let heading_font = "Noto Sans"

        #set text(font: body_font, size: 10pt)

        #show heading.where(level: 1): set text(font: heading_font, weight: "semibold", size: 14pt)
        #show heading.where(level: 2): set text(font: heading_font, weight: "semibold", size: 13pt)
        #show heading.where(level: 3): set text(font: heading_font, weight: "semibold", size: 11.2pt)

        #set page(
          footer: context [
            #line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: bnr_light_grey, thickness: 0.35pt))
            #v(3pt)
            #grid(
              columns: (1fr, auto),
              [#text(font: body_font, size: 7.3pt, fill: bnr_grey)[Barbados National Registry | The University of the West Indies]],
              [#text(font: body_font, size: 7.3pt, fill: bnr_grey)[Page #counter(page).display("1")]]
            )
          ]
        )
---

```{=typst}
#let bnr_grey = rgb("#666666")
#let uwi_logo = "../../../../assets/images/uwi-crestonly-20p.png"
#let body_font = "Noto Sans"
#let heading_font = "Noto Sans"

#block[
  #grid(
    columns: (42pt, 1fr),
    column-gutter: 9pt,
    align(top, image(uwi_logo, height: 38pt)),
    [
      #text(font: heading_font, size: 16pt, weight: "semibold")[Hospital Length of Stay in Barbados, 2010-2023]
      #linebreak()
      #text(font: body_font, size: 9.4pt, fill: bnr_grey)[Briefing created by the Barbados National Chronic Disease Registry, The University of the West Indies.]
      #linebreak()
      #text(font: body_font, size: 9.4pt, style: "italic", fill: bnr_grey)[Group Contacts - Christina Howitt (BNR lead) - Ian Hambleton (analytics) - Updated on 13 Nov 2025]
    ]
  )
  #v(5pt)
  #align(center)[
    #text(font: body_font, size: 9.4pt, fill: bnr_grey)[For all our surveillance outputs - https://uwi-bnr.github.io/info-hub/]
  ]
  #v(5pt)
  #line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("#555555"), thickness: 0.55pt))
]
#v(8pt)
```

## Why This Matters | What We Did
{{< include ../../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_los_2023_v1/why-this-matters.qmd >}}

## Key messages

- Length of stay is a practical measure of hospital burden after stroke and heart attack events.
- Median length of stay gives a robust summary of typical hospital use, avoiding distortion from rare very long stays.
- Changes in typical length of stay can accumulate into meaningful bed demand when applied across many admissions.
- Monitoring length of stay helps connect registry outputs to service planning and hospital capacity discussions.

```{=typst}
#v(6pt)
#block(width: 100%)[
  #text(font: "Noto Sans", size: 12.6pt, weight: "semibold")[
    Median length of hospital stay, 2010-2023
  ]
]
#v(3pt)
```

![](../../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_los_2023_v1/figures/cvd_los_median.png){width=65% fig-alt="Figure showing median length of hospital stay for stroke and heart attack events in Barbados from 2010 to 2023."}

## Key Messages | What This Mean
{{< include ../../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_los_2023_v1/what-this-means1.qmd >}}

```{=typst}
#v(6pt)
#block(width: 100%)[
  #text(font: "Noto Sans", size: 12.6pt, weight: "semibold")[
    Extra typical bed-days, 2014-2023
  ]
]
#v(3pt)
```

![](../../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_los_2023_v1/figures/cvd_los_bed_demand.png){width=85% fig-alt="Figure showing extra typical bed-days for stroke and heart attack events in Barbados from 2014 to 2023."}

## Translating Hospital Stays into Demand for Hospital Beds
{{< include ../../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_los_2023_v1/translating.qmd >}}

## Key Messages | What This Means
{{< include ../../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_los_2023_v1/what-this-means2.qmd >}}

## Outputs

Tables, figure data, metadata, workbook files, and build records are available in the online briefing.

## Citation

```{=typst}
#text(font: "Noto Sans", size: 8.4pt, fill: rgb("#666666"))[
  Barbados National Registry. #emph[Hospital length of stay in Barbados, 2010-2023: BNR CVD briefing, 2023]. Barbados National Chronic Disease Registry, The University of the West Indies. Available at: #link("https://uwi-bnr.github.io/info-hub/surveillance/cvd/briefings/hospital-los.html")[https://uwi-bnr.github.io/info-hub/surveillance/cvd/briefings/hospital-los.html]. Accessed: [insert date accessed].
]
```
